id.description: Unique identifier for the adapter, starting with 'oahl-adapter-'.

description.description: A short description of what the adapter does.

author.description: The GitHub username or organization name of the author.

repository.description: The URL of the source code repository.

npm_package.description: (Optional) The name of the NPM package if published.

pypi_package.description: (Optional) The name of the PyPI package if published.

capabilities.description: List of standard capabilities this adapter exposes (e.g., ['camera.capture']).

featured.description: Indicates if the adapter is featured on the marketplace. Maintained by OAHL core team.
